title: Crystallization of Zika virus NS2B-NS3 protease (closed conformation in space group P4322 | PDB ID: 8PN6)
author: Xiaomin Ni

steps_raw.instruction: Protein and buffer requirements: 43.2 µL 15 mg/mL Sample 2.88 mL, Crystallization screen

Dispense 30 µL, Crystallisation screen into SwissCI 3 lens plate reservoir wells using a 100 µl multi-channel pipette. Dispense 150 nL, nl 15 mg/mL Sample to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 150 nL, Crystallisation screen to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Drop ratio: 1:1 Final drop volume: 300 nl

Crystallisation screen composition: 30% w/v PEG 2000 0.2 Molarity (M) Ammonium sulfate 0.1 Molarity (M) sodium acetate pH 4.8 Stock solutions used: 1 Molarity (M) Ammonium sulfate 1 Molarity (M) Sodium acetate pH 4.8 50% w/v PEG 2000 The crystallisation screen can be stored in a duran bottle or aliquoted into 96 deep well block for easy dispensing into SwissCI 3 lens plates. For long term storage keep the Crystallisation screen in the fridge at 4°C.

Crystals typically form within 12 h, within 24 h they have reached their maximum size with slight precipitant. Crystals form on their own and have cubic appearance. (see image below) Morphology: cubic Size: ~50 μm in length, width and depth Average resolution: 1.7 Å Space group: P4 3 22 Unit cell: 43 Å, 43 Å, 217 Å 90.00°, 90.00°, 90.00° An example of a drop containing Zika NS2B-NS3 crystals.

Incubate at 20 °C for 24:00:00, h in Formulatrix Rock Imager. Imaging Schedule : The first images are taken after 12 h and the imaging schedule follows a Fibonacci sequence of days for further collections.
Formulatrix Rock Imager SPT mosquito Liquidator 96 5-200 μl pipette SwissCI 3 lens plate

Diamond Light Source Unattended Data Collection (UDC) Data Collection Temperature: 100K Detector: DECTRIS EIGER2 X 9M Beamline: I04-1 Wavelength: 0.9212 Å Resolution (Å): 1.62 Beam Size (μm): 60 X 50 Number of images: 3600 Oscillation: 0.10° Exposure (s): 0.0020 Transmission (%): 100 Flux (ph/s): 9.50e+11
Detailed information of the construct used for crystallization is in publication: Zika NS2B-NS3 protease co-expression construct small scale expression and purification protocol

The protein used for this assay was expressed and purified following the protocol below. The plasmid used was: Zika virus portion of NS2B protease coexpressed with NS3 protease addgene Catalog #228663 Zika NS2B-NS3 protease co-expression construct small scale expression and purification protocol by korvus.wang
